mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-04_1#Sql001 */ A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AS brandCode, A.BB_PRODUCT_NAME AS brandName, A.BB_PRODUCT_NAME || '（' || A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE || '）' AS brand, A.BB_STOCK AS unit, CASE WHEN A.BB_UNIT_KBN = '1' THEN DECODE(A.BB_STOCK, null, null, TO_CHAR(A.BB_STOCK, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '株') WHEN A.BB_UNIT_KBN = '2' THEN DECODE(A.BB_STOCK, null, null, TO_CHAR(A.BB_STOCK, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円') WHEN A.BB_UNIT_KBN = '3' THEN DECODE(A.BB_STOCK, null, null, TO_CHAR(A.BB_STOCK, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '口') END AS applyUnit, TO_CHAR(A.BB_LOT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS bbLotDate, A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE AS issuePriceType, A.BB_PRICE_FROM AS startPriceDisplay, A.BB_PRICE_TO AS finishPriceDisplay, A.BB_PRICE_CUT AS priceDisplayTick, A.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM AS startDiscountRate, A.BB_DISCOUNT_TO AS finishDiscountRate, A.BB_DISCOUNT_CUT AS discountRateTick, A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE AS marketOrderStrikePrice, TO_CHAR(NVL(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS bookBuildingPresentationFrom, TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS bookBuildingPresentationTo, TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS bookBuildingPresentationFromForKeep, TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') || '～' || TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS bookBuildingApplyPeriod, A.BB_SETTLE_DATE AS deliveryDueDate, A.BB_URGENT_STOP AS emergencyInputSuspend, DECODE(A.BB_UNIT_KBN, '1', '株', '2', '円', '3', '口', '株') AS sellBuyUnitType, A.BB_IPO_PO_KBN AS ipoPoClassification, CASE WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRICE_FROM, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' || '～' || TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRICE_TO, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN 'ディスカウント率・' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(A.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM, 'FM990.9999'), '.') || '%' || '～' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(A.BB_DISCOUNT_TO, 'FM990.9999'), '.') || '%' WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '1' AND A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN 'ストライクプライス・' || TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRICE_FROM, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' || '～' || TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRICE_TO, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '1' AND A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN 'ディスカウント率・ストライクプライス・' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(A.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM, 'FM990.9999'), '.') || '%' || '～' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(A.BB_DISCOUNT_TO, 'FM990.9999'), '.') || '%' END AS assumeCondition FROM CORDYS.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN CORDYS.M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') = B.PRESENTATION_FROM WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode12} AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') = #{req.bbPresentationFrom}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-04_1#Sql002 */ PRODUCT_CODE AS brandCode, PRESENTATION_FROM AS bookBuildingPresentationFrom, ATTACHED_BRAND AS brandCodeWith1, CIGARETTE_SHOW_FLAG AS smokingCigarette, EDELIV_ONLY_FLAG AS onlyElectronicDelivery, MAX_ALLOCATION AS maxAllocation, PAYMENT_DATE AS depositScheduleDate, BB_PERIOD_FROM AS bbPeriodFrom, BB_PERIOD_TO AS bbPeriodTo, PRICE AS issueBbPrice, PRESENTATION_DATE AS listedDate, TO_CHAR(CREATE_TIME,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createDate, CREATE_USER AS createUser, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_TIME,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updateDate, UPDATE_USER AS updateUser, SYS_ID AS functionId, TO_CHAR(BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS ifaBookBuildingPresentationFrom, TO_CHAR(BB_PRESENTATION_TO,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS ifaBookBuildingPresentationTo, COM AS comm, CHANGE_PRICE_FLAG AS changePriceFlag, CHANGE_PRICE_MSG AS changePriceMsg, CHANGE_BB_PERIOD_FLAG AS changeBbPeriodFlag, CHANGE_BB_PERIOD_MSG AS changeBbPeriodMsg FROM CORDYS.M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD WHERE PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode12} AND TO_CHAR(PRESENTATION_FROM) = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{req.bbPresentationFrom},'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi'),'YYYYMMDD')

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-04_1#Sql003 */ COUNT(*) AS subscriptInputCount FROM CORDYS.T_IPO_PO_ORDER WHERE PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode12} AND TO_CHAR(PRESENTATION_FROM) = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{req.bbPresentationFrom},'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi'),'YYYYMMDD')

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-04_1#Sql004 */ COUNT(*) AS subscriptPeriodInfoRegisterCount FROM CORDYS.M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD WHERE PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode12} AND TO_CHAR(PRESENTATION_FROM) = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{req.bbPresentationFrom} ,'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi'),'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.insert:
INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-04_1#Sql005 */ INTO M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD ( PRODUCT_CODE, PRESENTATION_FROM, ATTACHED_BRAND, CIGARETTE_SHOW_FLAG, EDELIV_ONLY_FLAG, MAX_ALLOCATION, PAYMENT_DATE, BB_PERIOD_FROM, BB_PERIOD_TO, PRICE, PRESENTATION_DATE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, SYS_ID, BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, BB_PRESENTATION_TO, COM, CHANGE_PRICE_FLAG, CHANGE_PRICE_MSG, CHANGE_BB_PERIOD_FLAG, CHANGE_BB_PERIOD_MSG ) VALUES( #{req.brandCode}, TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}), #{req.brandCodeWith1}, #{req.smokingCigarette}, #{req.onlyElectronicDelivery}, TO_NUMBER(#{req.maxAllocation}), #{req.depositScheduleDate}, #{req.bbPeriodFrom}, #{req.bbPeriodTo},
TO_NUMBER(#{req.issueBbPrice}),
null,
#{req.listedDate}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser}, 'SUB0204_01-04_1', TO_DATE(#{req.ifaBookBuildingPresentationFrom}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{req.ifaBookBuildingPresentationTo}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), TO_NUMBER(#{req.comm}), #{req.changePriceFlag}, #{req.changePriceMsg}, #{req.changeBbPeriodFlag}, #{req.changeBbPeriodMsg} )
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-04_1#Sql007 */ COUNT(*) AS nonBusinessDayCount FROM CORDYS.M_CALENDAR WHERE C_DELETE_FLG = '0' AND C_BUS_NONBUS_DIV = '0' AND C_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = 'JP' AND C_TARGET_DATE = #{req.date} AND C_CALENDAR_ID = 'T003'
